effects_provenance.raw: Grape Zest THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Grape Zest THCA Flower is a vibrant hybrid that brings together juicy fruit flavor and an invigorating, uplifting high. The cultivar produces dense, deeply colored buds with an aromatic profile bursting with ripe grapes, tangy citrus, and a hint of sweet candy accented by subtle herbal undertones. Effects Grape Zest delivers an uplifting, mood-lifting experience that pairs cerebral lift with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of bright character that distinguishes flavor-led grape hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: juicy grape up front, with bright lemon-citrus through the middle and a sweet candy-herbal finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads grape-and-citrus — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Grape Zest harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Grape Zest THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Grape Zest THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. 🥚 Citrus Grape hybrid Lemon THCA Flower Lost In Translation

Permanent Marker THCA Flower Supreme / 28g Strain Profile Permanent Marker THCA Flower is a potent hybrid built on a stacked pedigree: Biscotti , Sherb BX , and Jealousy . The result is a high-end cultivar with bold bag appeal — dense, frost-coated buds, deep coloration, and the kind of pungent, gas-edged terpene profile that makes a jar instantly recognizable. Effects Permanent Marker hits hard. The cerebral onset is fast and pronounced, settling into a deeply relaxed body high that pulls toward the heavy end of hybrid. Best paired with downtime, decompression, or any setting where intensity is welcome. New or low-tolerance users should approach with respect. Flavor & Aroma On the nose: pungent gas up front, sweet berry layered through the middle, and a warm earthy-cookie finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and richly textured, with the kind of coating mouthfeel that comes from a loud terpene profile. The character reads gas-and-dessert — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. effects_provenance.raw: Gary Payton THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Gary Payton THCa Flower Strain Gary Payton THCa Flower is a balanced hybrid known for its quick-hitting effects, bold flavor, and award-winning lineage. A cross of Snowman × Cherry Pie × Girl Scout Cookies, this strain is a heavy-hitter with a smooth, cookie-diesel punch and a clear-headed high. Gary Payton has earned multiple cannabis cup honors, taking 1st place at the 2022 Errl Cup in Arizona (hash category) and 2nd place at the 2022 Emerald Cup. Whether you're after focus, energy, or flavorful smoke, Gary Payton checks every box. Shop premium indoor-grown Gary Payton THCa Flower now at Hemp Hop. Gary Payton Strain Highlights Type: Balanced Hybrid (50% Indica / 50% Sativa) Parent Strains: Snowman × Cherry Pie × Girl Scout Cookies Flavors: Nutty cherry cookies, sugary diesel, sweet spice Aroma: Diesel-forward with sweet cherries, earthy berries, and spice Effects: Focused, relaxed, happy, body high, uplifting THCa - 30.26% What is Gary Payton Strain? Gary Payton THCa Flower delivers an instant mental lift with a flavorful profile that brings together creamy cookies, fruity cherries, and diesel undertones. It’s fast-acting and clean. Designed for clarity, not couchlock. The high starts right away with a boost in focus, mental clarity, and elevated mood. As it builds, a smooth body calm settles in, relaxing you without slowing your thoughts. It's no surprise this strain has taken home multiple Cannabis Cup awards. Gary Payton Strain Cannabinoids THCa: 30.26% Delta 9 THC - 0.11% Total Cannabinoids: 30.37% Gary Payton Strain Terpenes Terpineol Limonene Linalool Gary Payton THCa Flower Effects This hybrid is made for function, flavor, and focus: Uplifting head high with zero fog Smooth energy and mood enhancement Mellow body buzz that doesn’t overpower Great for creative work, social sessions, or any time of day Type Balanced Hybrid – ideal for day or evening use without heavy sedation Why Choose Hemp Hop for Gary Payton Strain? Hemp Hop delivers small-batch THCa flower known for quality, flavor, and effect. effects_provenance.raw: Ice Cream Breath x Shoreline 3.5g (1/8 oz) NEW RESTOCK Ice Cream Breath x Shoreline is a bold and aromatic hybrid that captures the laid-back luxury of a coastal getaway. This strain greets the senses with a creamy, skunky sweetness layered with notes of diesel, pine, and subtle floral funk—like a seaside ice cream truck parked near a blooming shoreline. On the inhale, expect a rich, velvety flavor of vanilla cream swirled with earthy herbs and a salty tang reminiscent of ocean air. Hints of fuel and sour citrus add complexity, making each puff a flavorful journey from indulgent to invigorating. The effects of Ice Cream Breath x Shoreline lean into deep relaxation without losing clarity. It kicks off with a hazy, happy headspace—great for conversation, introspection, or watching the waves roll in. Gradually, a soothing body buzz takes over, easing physical tension while keeping your energy grounded and balanced. Whether you’re chilling at sunset or winding down after a long day, this strain is ideal for those who appreciate flavor-forward hybrids with a mellow, euphoric edge. Perfect for creative flow, mellow hangs, or simply savoring the calm. Flower Type 1 Flow Gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Animal Runtz – THCa Flower Size: 14g, Quantity:: 1 Pack Premium THCa Hemp Flower Animal Runtz (Balanced Hybrid) 34.99 % Total THCa 100% Naturally Grown 3rd Party Lab Tested Federal Farm Bill Compliant *** We do not ship to California. *** Animal Runtz THCa Flower is an exotic and potent Hybrid strain that delivers a unique and captivating experience. Its complex flavor profile blends sweet and fruity notes with a creamy undertone and subtle earthy or spicy hints, offering a delightfully satisfying taste with every inhale. Animal Runtz’s intriguing profile is a cross between Animal Cookies and Runtz, two strains celebrated for their distinctive aromas and potent effects. The pungent aroma is a unique combination of fruity candy-like sweetness and earthy, slightly gassy undertones, creating a complex and inviting fragrance. This potent and balanced hybrid boasts an impressive 29.61% THCa content, delivering a strong wave of euphoria and noticeable body relaxation. Perfect for various times of the day, Animal Runtz offers a well-rounded experience with both cerebral stimulation and soothing physical effects. This strain also features visually striking buds, often displaying a mix of vibrant colors coated in a generous layer of frosty trichomes. We submit each batch of our premium USA-grown Animal Runtz THCa Flower for third-party lab testing to verify its potency and Farm Bill compliance. When you want a unique and potent smoking experience that delivers both uplifting mental effects and comfortable physical relaxation, explore this captivating hybrid that is rapidly gaining popularity. **This product is not available for shipment to the following states: Hawaii, Idaho, Minnesota, Oregon, Rhode Island, Utah, Vermont.
